entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: A legume crop studied for its growth and yield response to abiotic stresses

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: A condition of deficiency of moisture in the soil

entities.name: HIGH TEMPERATURE
entities.description: An abiotic stress characterized by elevated ambient temperatures

entities.name: WATER STRESS
entities.description: The stress experienced by a plant when water availability is insufficient

entities.name: GROWTH
entities.description: The physical development and increase in size of the plant

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The agricultural productivity and components of the crop

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The overall output of the crop per unit area

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant genotype to maintain growth and yield under water-limited conditions

entities.name: UPPER KABETE FIELD STATION
entities.description: The site where the greenhouse experiment was conducted

entities.name: UNIVERSITY OF NAIROBI
entities.description: The institution associated with the Upper Kabete field station

entities.name: KENYA
entities.description: The country where the research was conducted

entities.name: GREENHOUSE EXPERIMENT
entities.description: A controlled environment study used to evaluate plant responses

entities.name: ICRISAT DESCRIPTORS
entities.description: Standardized criteria used for the selection of pigeonpea genotypes

entities.name: FIELD CAPACITY
entities.description: The amount of soil moisture or water content held in the soil after drainage of excess water

entities.name: RANDOMIZED COMPLETE BLOCK DESIGN
entities.description: An experimental design used to minimize the effect of variations between experimental units

entities.name: FACTORIAL ARRANGEMENT
entities.description: An experimental setup used to study the effects of two or more factors simultaneously

entities.name: 100 SEED WEIGHT
entities.description: The combined weight of 100 seeds, used as a yield component

entities.name: NUMBER OF PODS
entities.description: The count of pods produced per plant

entities.name: POD DIAMETER
entities.description: The measurement of the width of the pods

entities.name: POD WEIGHT
entities.description: The mass of the pods produced

entities.name: POD LENGTH
entities.description: The measurement of the length of the pods

entities.name: CHLOROPHYLL CONTENT
entities.description: The amount of chlorophyll present in the plant tissues, indicating physiological health

entities.name: SHELL WEIGHT
entities.description: The weight of the pod shell

entities.name: NUMBER OF SEEDS PER POD
entities.description: The count of seeds contained within a single pod
